tests.title: Verify security disclaimer appears on chat initialization
preconditions: User is on a page with the chat widget enabled
Chat session is not currently active
steps: Click on the chat icon to open the chat window.
Observe the initial content displayed in the chat interface.
tests.expected_result: A security disclaimer regarding financial data is visible immediately upon opening the window.

tests.title: Verify disclaimer text content accuracy
steps: Read the text of the displayed security warning message.
tests.expected_result: The message explicitly mentions not sharing 'credit card numbers', 'bank details', or 'financial data'.

tests.title: Verify disclaimer placement and visibility
steps: Locate the text input box at the bottom of the chat window.
Identify the position of the security disclaimer.
tests.expected_result: The disclaimer is positioned either as the first message in the chat history or directly above the text input area.

tests.title: Verify warning message is not hidden by input focus
steps: Click inside the chat text input box to focus the cursor.
Verify the visibility of the security disclaimer.
tests.expected_result: The warning message does not disappear, get obscured, or become hidden when the user interacts with the input field.

notes: The 'Negative' test ensures that user interaction (typing/focus) does not trigger a logic error that clears the mandatory security warning before the user has finished their session.
